title: Geometry, Scale, Similarity, and Spatial Planning · Model Lens: Similarity Pythagorean
summary: Create a scale plan for an accessible room layout with paths, clearances, paint, and flooring. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math beg similarity pythagorean increment in an accessible scale floor plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use similarity and the Pythagorean theorem only when their geometric conditions hold.
Use a consistent scale factor to move between drawings and actual dimensions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
